testcase.name: launchApplication

error.message: Unable to obtain: msedgedriver, error msedgedriver must exist: edge.exe For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location/ Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.11' Driver info: driver.version: EdgeDriver
